allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) # Look for figma configuration - mask any tokens if ''mcpServers'' in data: for name, config in data[''mcpServers''].items\(\): if ''figma'' in name.lower\(\): print\(f''Server: {name}''\) env = config.get\(''env'', {}\) for k, v in env.items\(\): print\(f'' {k}: {v[:10]}...'' if len\(v\) > 10 else f'' {k}: {v}''\) cmd = config.get\(''command'', ''''\) args = config.get\(''args'', []\) print\(f'' command: {cmd} {args}''\) ")
